sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73104" key="o)ligo/fwnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγό-φωνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73104.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with little tone,</tr_> prob. <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἄφωνα</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:1:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
